recommendations.title: The Maker
recommendations.overview: A strange creature races against time to make the most important and beautiful creation of his life.

recommendations.title: Spice World
recommendations.overview: World famous pop group the Spice Girls zip around London in their luxurious double decker tour bus having various adventures and performing for their fans.

recommendations.title: New Gods: Nezha Reborn
recommendations.overview: While living as an ordinary deliveryman and motor racing fan, Nezha encounters old nemeses and must rediscover his powers to protect his loved ones.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: Lorenzo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Horror
recommendations.overview: A cat named Lorenzo is dismayed to discover that his tail has developed a personality of its own.

recommendations.title: Rock Dog 2: Rock Around the Park
recommendations.overview: When Bodi and his band 'True Blue' leave Snow Mountain to tour with pop sensation Lil' Foxy, they learn that fame comes at a price.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: Daddy, I'm a Zombie
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of a teenager girl in her new life as zombie.

recommendations.title: Yellow Submarine
recommendations.overview: The wicked Blue Meanies take over Pepperland, eliminating all color and music. As the only survivor, the Lord Admiral escapes in the yellow submarine and journeys to Liverpool to enlist the help of the Beatles.

recommendations.title: Trolls Band Together
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Music, Fantasy, Comedy, Adventure
